message:
feat(fcp-protocol): add FCPC benchmarks, fuzz target, and ControlPlaneObject

Add criterion benchmarks for FCPC frame operations including header
encode/decode, frame seal/open, and full encode/decode cycles.

Add libfuzzer fuzz target for FCPC frame parsing to ensure no panics
on arbitrary input and validate DoS resistance.

Implement ControlPlaneObject type and retention classification system:
- ControlPlaneRetention enum (Required vs Ephemeral)
- retention_for_schema() helper for schema-based classification
- requires_storage() convenience helper

Ref: flywheel_connectors-1n78.13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,3 +39,7 @@ criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
 [[bench]]
 name = "fcps_parsing"
 harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "fcpc_parsing"
+harness = false

@@ -41,5 +41,12 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_fcpc_frame"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fcpc_frame.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]
